## Checklist

- [ ] I checked the README for duplicates.
- [ ] Each new entry uses one Markdown link and one objective sentence.
- [ ] Descriptions avoid hype, star counts, and unverified claims.
- [ ] Security, WiFi, HID, and automation entries are framed around legitimate educational, defensive, or personal-device use.
- [ ] I checked that added links are reachable.
